sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74234" key="o)cu/blatta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ´-βλαττα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<sense id="n74234.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀξύς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0060.tlg001.perseus-grc3:11:2b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2b</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) in Lat. form <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oxyblatta, bright purple,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.40.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
